Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Governor General芒聙聶s Act
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Governor General芒聙聶s Act

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Governor General芒聙聶s Act to set the Governor General芒聙聶s annual salary at $1. It also repeals Part II of the Act in order to remove the right to a retiring annuity and amends other acts in consequence.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Subsection 4(1) of the Governor General芒聙聶s Act is replaced by the following:

Subsection.Text: There shall be payable to the Governor General an annual salary of $1 beginning on February 1, 2021.

Section.Text: Section 4.1 of the Act is repealed.
Part II of the Act is repealed.

Heading.TitleText: Garnishment, Attachment and Pension Diversion Act

Section.Text: The schedule to the Garnishment, Attachment and Pension Diversion Act is amended by striking out the reference to 芒聙聹1 Governor General芒聙聶s Act.芒聙聺.
The definition pension plan in section 2 of the Pension Benefits Division Act is amended by striking out subparagraph (a)(viii).
Paragraph 8(2)(c) of the Supplementary Retirement Benefits Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (c)
Paragraph.Text: any benefit calculated by reference to an annuity payable under the Judges Act,

Section.Text: Schedule I to the Act is amended by striking out the reference to 芒聙聹1 Governor General芒聙聶s Act.芒聙聺.

Part II of the Governor General芒聙聶s Act, as it read immediately before February 1, 2021, continues to apply with respect to an annuity referred to in section 6 or 7 that became payable before that date.
This Act is deemed to have come into force on February 1, 2021.
